Registradores:
h = 00000000000000000000000000000001
lv = 00000000000000000000000000000010
mar = 00000000000000000000000000000001
mdr = 00000000000000000000000000110010

Memoria:
00000000000000000000000000001010
00000000000000000000000000010100
00000000000000000000000000011110
00000000000000000000000000101000
00000000000000000000000000110010
00000000000000000000000000111100
00000000000000000000000001000110
00000000000000000000000001010000
00000000000000000000000000000000
00000000000000000000000000000000
00000000000000000000000000000000
00000000000000000000000000000000
00000000000000000000000000000000
00000000000000000000000000000000
00000000000000000000000000000000
00000000000000000000000000000000

Instrução:
00111100000001000010101
00110100000000000100000
00110100000000000010000

esperado:

1: soma -> LV atualizado
2: write -> memoria alterada
3: read -> MDR atualizado
